children.characters: Submit a new budget request for review and approval via the ACT workflow engine.

children.svg: <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M2 6l2.5 2.5L10 3.5"></path></svg>

children.characters: Select your primary cost centre for budget deduction
Enter amount in INR — Indian comma format auto-applied
Vendor risk profile will be checked automatically
Accepted: PDF, XLSX, JPG, PNG · Max 20 MB per file

children.characters: Requests > ₹50,00,000 require dual sign-off (Department Head + Finance Controller).
Machinery purchases require 3 competitive vendor quotes as evidence.
Your request amount (₹78,50,000) triggers dual sign-off policy.
All Capex requests must align with approved WBS element in the current fiscal plan.
Requests > ₹1,00,00,000 require CFO approval before SAP posting.
